name: Full Machine Qualification
description: Runs the production rigorous qualification suites without exploratory or baseline duplicate suites.

steps.notes: Confirm the full XY/Z motion envelope is clear.
Connect the closed-loop pressure fixture rated for at least 3 psi.
Connect the closed-loop valve pulse fixture rated for at least 3 psi.
Load the dummy blocked head only when prompted; keep the XY envelope clear.
